item.text: Accelerates channel zapping on receivers with FBC (Full Band Capture) tuners,
with safe Pay-TV options. Makes channel zapping up to 11x faster!

item.description: Master on/off for the plugin. Off: no zap acceleration at all.
Safety brake. Off lets the plugin keep running but blocks every tuner reservation. Zap-Duration overlay active.
On: the plugin actually reserves tuners - this is where the speedup comes from. Off: dry-run mode without touching tuners.
Frees up all reserved tuners the moment a recording starts, so the recording always gets a tuner. Leave on unless this box never records.
Frees up all reserved tuners when Picture-in-Picture is opened, so PiP always gets a tuner.
Sets a tuner to be reserved for the next channel in the bouquet. If yes, fast Zap when Channel Up.
Sets a tuner to be reserved for the previous channel in the bouquet. If yes, fast Zap when Channel Down.
Sets a tuner to be reserved for the recently watched channel in the bouquet. If yes, fast Zap when tuning to recently watched channel.
Lets companion plugins (e.g. FCC-Extender) feed a service reference into a dedicated EXTERNAL pool slot. Turn on only when a paired plugin is installed and configured.
Auto-releases the EXTERNAL slot if the caller forgets to send a release call. Long enough for normal EPG reads, short enough that a leaked slot does not hold a tuner forever. Rarely needs adjustment.

item.text: Activate descrambler in NEXT pay-TV pre-tune
item.description: Only for Pay-TV channels after Channel Up: Activates the descrambler for the relevant tuner so there is no black frame for the first ECM to arrive after channel switch. BUT: Costs one continuous extra decryption session (ECM stream) so be aware when cardsharing or what smartcard/CAM can handle.

item.text: Activate descrambler in PREVIOUS pay-TV pre-tune
item.description: Only for Pay-TV channels after Channel Down: Activates the descrambler for the relevant tuner so there is no black frame for the first ECM to arrive after channel switch. BUT: Costs one continuous extra decryption session (ECM stream) so be aware when cardsharing or what smartcard/CAM can handle.

item.text: Activate descrambler in LAST pay-TV pre-tune (history)
item.description: Only for Pay-TV channels on the Recall Button: Activates the descrambler for the relevant tuner so there is no black frame for the first ECM to arrive after channel switch. BUT: Costs one continuous extra decryption session (ECM stream) so be aware when cardsharing or what smartcard/CAM can handle.

Only for external Pay-TV pre-tune: Activates the descrambler for the relevant tuner so there is no black frame for the first ECM to arrive after channel switch. BUT: Costs one continuous extra decryption session (ECM stream) so be aware when cardsharing or what smartcard/CAM can handle.
Shows a small overlay after each zap with the measured switch time in milliseconds (green = fast, red = slow).
Writes detailed traces to /tmp/fbc_csc.log. Only useful for bug reports - leave off in normal use.
